title: DK MARKET
description: DKMARKET is a Spigot 1.21 plugin that allows players to create their own individual shops with a graphical interface to sell items to other players in a marketplace system.
body:
## 📋 Overview
**DKMARKET** is an individual player marketplace system with graphical interface (GUI) developed for Spigot 1.21. It allows each player to have their own virtual shop where they can sell items to other players.

## 🎯 Main Features
- **Individual shops** for each player
- **Intuitive graphical interface** (GUI) for management
- **Economy system** compatible with Vault and PlayerPoints
- **Global marketplace** to view all shops
- **Centralized administration** with control panel

## 🎮 Commands

### Main Command: `/dkmarket` or `/market` or `/shop`
- **Description**: Main marketplace command
- **Usage**: `/dkmarket [item]`
- **Aliases**: `market`, `shop`

#### Sub-commands:
- `/dkmarket` - Opens the main marketplace interface
- `/dkmarket item` - Adds the held item to your shop (requires holding an item)

## 🔐 Permissions

### Plugin Permissions:
- `dkmarket.use` - Permission to use the marketplace *(default: true)*
- `dkmarket.create` - Permission to create shops *(default: true)*
- `dkmarket.admin` - Full permission to manage all shops and settings *(default: op)*

### How it works:
- **Players with `dkmarket.create`** can automatically create their own shops
- **Players with `dkmarket.use`** can browse the marketplace and buy items
- **Administrators with `dkmarket.admin`** have access to the admin panel

## 🛒 Shop Features

### For shop owners:
- Automatically create shop when using the command
- Add items by holding them and using `/dkmarket item`
- Set custom prices via chat
- Manage items through graphical interface
- Limit of 50 items per shop (configurable)

### For buyers:
- Browse global marketplace with all shops
- Buy items directly from other shops
- View prices in different currencies
- Intuitive interface with categories

## 💰 Economy System
- **Vault Support**: Compatible with all economy plugins that use Vault
- **PlayerPoints Support**: Alternative using player points
- **Configurable prices**: Minimum 1 coin, maximum 1,000,000 (configurable)
- **Multiple currencies**: Support for different currency types

## ⚙️ Configuration
The plugin has a `config.yml` file with options for:
- Default currency type
- Item limits per shop
- Automatic save interval
- Customization of messages and interfaces
- Security and permission settings

## 🔧 Dependencies
- **Soft-depend**: Vault and PlayerPoints (optional, but recommended)
- **Server version**: Spigot 1.21 or higher

## 📊 Data Saving
- Data automatically saved every 5 minutes (configurable)
- Data persistence between server restarts
- Automatic backup when disabling the plugin
